title: Haplopteris pluridichotoma

As a member of the family Adiantaceae, Haplopteris pluridichotoma is closely related to other species of ferns that share similar characteristics. The genus Haplopteris is also part of this family and is known to contain various species of ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Through its classification, Haplopteris pluridichotoma is further understood in its evolutionary and taxonomic context.
